subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the hem of the Covenant in this Age, wherein the effulgent rays of the Covenant have illumined both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بذیل المیثاق در این عهد که انوار عهد شرق و غرب را منور نموده و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
